title: ProcessFlowMigration - Metadata API
description: Represents a process's migrated criteria and the resulting migrated flow.

destinationFlowDefinition.description: The ID of the resulting migrated flow.

destinationFlowVersion.description: The version ID of the migrated flow.

developerName.description: The unique name of the object in the API. This name can contain only underscores and alphanumeric characters, and must be unique in your org. It must begin with a letter, not include spaces, not end with an underscore, and not contain two consecutive underscores.

migratedCriteriaLabel.description: The label of the criteria that was migrated.

migratedCriteriaName.description: The name of the criteria that was migrated.

processVersion.description: The version ID of the originating process.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="Metadata">
  <xsd:sequence>
    <xsd:element name="fullName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
  </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType>
<xsd:complexType name="ProcessFlowMigration">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="destinationFlowDefinition" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="destinationFlowVersion" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="developerName" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="masterLabel" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="migratedCriteriaLabel" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="migratedCriteriaName" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="processVersion" type="xsd:string"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
```
